visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown ribbed sweater and small gold hoop earrings, looks at the camera with an expression of exaggerated surprise, mouth open. Behind her is a brightly lit buffet counter with trays of fresh seafood, including red crabs and shrimp. (2) The woman is seen in a stone-lined outdoor hot spring bath at a resort, wearing a white swimsuit and a white towel wrapped on her head. She smiles and waves at the camera. The lighting is bright and natural. (3) The scene shifts to a restaurant interior where a platter of roasted whole chickens is displayed. The woman, now in a grey hoodie, eats a piece of chicken with her hands using plastic gloves, showing a satisfied facial expression. (4) Inside a modern hotel suite with clean lines and warm lighting, the woman is seen soaking her feet in an indoor private stone tub looking out a large window at a city skyline during the day. (5) Back at a buffet, she holds up a large red crab leg toward the camera. Plates of sashimi and other seafood dishes are arranged on the table in front of her. (6) A montage of short clips follows: a person cooking teppanyaki on a grill, a night view of an illuminated swimming pool from a high balcony, and the woman waving in front of a brewery sign. (7) In a park setting with a red bridge and green pond, the woman leans against the railing. A black swan is visible swimming in the water below. She waves goodbye to the camera with a bright smile.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國人首次體驗!! 臺中溫泉吃到飽buffet. [Variety]: ?. [Slogan]: 韓國人直接嚇歪?. (2) [Subtitle]: 臺中 有吃到飽buffet + 溫泉的酒店?. (3) [Subtitle]: 今天為了這個特地下來臺中. (4) [Logo]: 麒麟峰溫泉料理. [Subtitle]: 首先，來到麒麟峰溫泉料理. (5) [Subtitle]: 特製土窯雞，溫泉土窯雞都好好吃喔. (6) [Subtitle]: 口感Q嫩! 肉汁爆發!. (7) [Subtitle]: 配炒水蓮一起吃的話超好吃. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後冬天想補身體的人記得喝他們的烏骨雞湯. (9) [Logo]: 日光溫泉會館. [Subtitle]: 接下來是日光溫泉會館. (10) [Subtitle]: 位於臺中的大坑溫泉區. (11) [Subtitle]: 屬於碳酸氫鈉泉，不會臭. (12) [Subtitle]: 洗後光滑柔細不黏膩. (13) [Subtitle]: 跟硫磺溫泉又完全不一樣的魅力呢. (14) [Logo]: 清新溫泉飯店. [Subtitle]: 今晚要住的地方是清新溫泉飯店. (15) [Subtitle]: 裡面空間好大，每一間房間都有私人湯屋. (16) [Subtitle]: 可以安心泡湯泡腳. (17) [Subtitle]: 烏日溫泉區是天然溫泉. (18) [Subtitle]: 無色無味水質純淨. (19) [Subtitle]: 這裡有吃到飽buffet. (20) [Variety]: 超豐富!. [Subtitle]: 吃到飽真的好豐富. (21) [Subtitle]: 可以泡湯完來吃. (22) [Subtitle]: 身心疲憊都消失. (23) [Subtitle]: 而且晚上的夜景也超漂亮. (24) [Subtitle]: 睡覺前一定要看夜景喔. (25) [Logo]: 烏日啤酒觀光工廠. [Subtitle]: 第二天去附近的烏日啤酒觀光工廠. (26) [Subtitle]: 這裡7-11可以看啤酒歷史展覽. (27) [Subtitle]: 也可以喝這邊生產的特殊啤酒. (28) [Logo]: 銅鑼灣港式餐廳. [Subtitle]: 下一站是銅鑼灣港式餐廳. (29) [Subtitle]: 餐點都好道地好好吃. (30) [Variety]: 卡滋 (聽到嗎? 🥺). (31) [Subtitle]: 烤鴨跟脆皮燒肉一定要吃喔. (32) [Subtitle]: 來臺中不知道要吃什麼的話非常推薦來這裡喔. (33) [Logo]: 秋紅谷. [Subtitle]: 最後一站是秋紅谷. (34) [Subtitle]: 這裡實在太漂亮了. (35) [Subtitle]: 是亞洲首創! 全臺唯一的下凹綠地公園. (36) [Subtitle]: 然後還可以看到黑天鵝超神奇. (37) [Subtitle]: 這樣我的臺中溫泉旅遊大成功. (38) [Logo]: 2024-2025 TAIWAN Waves of Wonder. [Variety]: 廣告.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 background staff/patrons in restaurant and park scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with long dark wavy hair, wearing a brown ribbed sweater in the intro, a white swimsuit/top in the spa, and a grey zip-up hoodie over a pink top in the outdoor scenes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Multiple locations in Taichung including the 'Qilin Peak' restaurant with wooden interior, 'Sunlight Hot Spring Resort' with stone baths, 'Freshfields Resort' with city view windows, a brewery museum with beer bottles, and the 'Maple Garden' urban park with a red bridge.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice-over begins immediately over an upbeat, 4-on-the-floor electronic pop BGM. The speaker's tone is very excited and bright. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies the first visual scene cut. The narration continues at a fast pace with very clear articulation. (3) A 'ding' sound effect is heard as variety-style text pops onto the screen. The music maintains its constant high-tempo beat. (4) A distinct, crisp 'crunch' sound effect is mixed prominently into the track at 00:47, synchronized with the woman biting into crispy pork. (5) The narrator concludes with a rising, joyful intonation as the BGM stays consistent until a final hard cut at the end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location A Showcase -> Location B Showcase -> Location C Showcase -> Closing Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote tourism in Taichung, Taiwan, specifically highlighting the luxury of hot spring resorts and the abundance of seafood buffet dining to potential visitors, likely targeting a Korean audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear branding for various Taichung hotels and the final 'TAIWAN Waves of Wonder' tourism board logo.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal social media style with fast cuts and bold text overlays to maximize engagement for tourism marketing.
